overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a rural mountain village and surrounding meadows. The character transitions from a village path to open grassland while drawing his sword, with snow-capped mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village path with wooden cottages

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the mountain village with weapons sheathed

entered.detail: traditional wooden cottage with thatched roof on hillside
low stone retaining wall along the path
rustic wooden fence lining the right side of the path
tall mountain peak with snow visible in the distance
leafless tree trunk near the village houses

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through a rural mountain village. Traditional wooden farmhouses sit on the left hillside behind stone walls, while a wooden fence lines the right side of the path. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distance under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from village to open meadow

events.description: character draws steel sword from back sheath while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking through the meadow with weapon now drawn and ready

entered.detail: grassy hillside replacing the stone walls and buildings
dense evergreen forest on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide meadow as the village buildings recede behind. The character draws his sword while walking, transitioning from the built environment to open grassland. Pine forests become visible on the right horizon as the mountain shifts to the right of the frame.

events.description: villager NPC comes into view standing by the stone wall on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the meadow with sword drawn, approaching a villager near the wall

notable_agents.action: villager in blue clothing standing by the stone wall, facing the path

entered.detail: stacked stone wall running along the left side of the path
colorful wildflowers growing along the path edges

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the open meadow with sword drawn, passing wildflowers along the trail. A stone wall appears on the left where a villager in blue clothing stands. The wooden fence recedes into the distance as the path leads deeper into the mountain valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a structured mountain village into an expansive, open valley meadow. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path flanked by traditional wooden farmhouses and stone walls, with snow-capped peaks looming under a bright blue sky. As the village buildings recede, the path opens into a wide grassland where the character draws his sword, shifting the perspective toward pine forests on the right horizon. The scene then expands further into the meadow, passing wildflowers and a stone wall where a villager in blue clothing stands. Finally, the wooden fences of the village vanish into the distance as the camera follows the character deeper into the mountain valley.
